name: Pre-Call Research Brief Generator
description: Fetches today's meetings from Gmail/Calendar, searches Exa for recent company news about meeting attendees, Claude AI creates a comprehensive pre-call research brief, and posts it to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Scrape recent news about a company before a call

calendarKey.description: Google Calendar connection key for fetching meetings

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for company research

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the brief

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the research brief

companyOverride.description: Optional: specific company to research (overrides calendar extraction)

steps.name: Extract companies and attendees from meetings
Build Claude prompt for pre-call brief
Build Slack Block Kit research brief
